𝗙𝗥𝗘𝗘-𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘-𝗖𝗢𝗗𝗘 | To enable users to access and utilize various AI models (including free and local ones) through the Claude Code client-side protocol without altering the client's behavior.  📈 Growing!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enable users to access and utilize various AI models (including free and local ones) through the Claude Code client-side protocol without altering the client's behavior.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Drop-in proxy for Claude Code's Anthropic API calls
✅ Supports 17 provider backends (NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, Google AI Studio, etc.)
✅ Per-model routing for different traffic types (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku)
✅ Native Claude Code model picker support
✅ Handles streaming, tool use, and reasoning blocks
✅ Optional Discord/Telegram bot wrapper
✅ Optional VSCode extension integration
✅ Optional voice-note transcription via Whisper or NVIDIA NIM
✅ Local Admin UI for proxy settings and provider validation


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 33.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 5.2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 177 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a drop-in proxy for Anthropic's Claude Code API, allowing users to route API traffic to various free, paid, or local model providers. It maintains client-side protocol stability while offering flexibility in model selection and integration with tools like VS Code and Discord bots.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code

𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘-𝗖𝗢𝗗𝗘-𝗩𝗜𝗗𝗘𝗢-𝗧𝗢𝗢𝗟𝗞𝗜𝗧 | Automating the creation of videos from concept to final render using AI and open-source tools, suitable for developers and content creators looking for an efficient and cost-effective video production pipeline.  📈 Growing!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automating the creation of videos from concept to final render using AI and open-source tools, suitable for developers and content creators looking for an efficient and cost-effective video production pipeline.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-driven scriptwriting and video generation
✅ Integration with open-source AI models for voiceover, image, and music generation
✅ Programmatic video creation and rendering
✅ Interactive setup and video creation workflow via Claude Code
✅ Cost-effective video production using affordable cloud resources and free tiers


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 246 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

The claude-code-video-toolkit is an AI-native video production workspace that leverages open-source models to automate video creation. It takes a user's concept and generates scripts, voiceovers, music, and visuals, ultimately rendering an MP4 file.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/digitalsamba/claude-code-video-toolkit

𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗘 | Monitoring the health, uptime, and performance of servers and websites.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Monitoring the health, uptime, and performance of servers and websites.
📅 Created: Apr 2024 • Updated: Jun 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time server hardware monitoring
✅ Uptime and response time tracking
✅ Incident tracking and alerting
✅ Beautiful visualizations
✅ Self-hosted application
✅ Optional agent (Capture) for detailed server metrics (CPU, RAM, disk, temperature)
✅ Scalable to 1000+ active monitors


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 10K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 89 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Checkmate is an open-source, self-hosted application for real-time monitoring of server hardware, uptime, and response times. It provides beautiful visualizations and alerts for incidents, and can optionally integrate with a Capture agent for deeper server insights.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗦𝗞𝗬𝗥𝗜𝗙𝗧-𝗦𝗘𝗥𝗩𝗘𝗥 | To serve as the backend infrastructure for a multiplayer online role-playing game, handling all server-side game logic and state management.  

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To serve as the backend infrastructure for a multiplayer online role-playing game, handling all server-side game logic and state management.
📅 Created: Apr 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Authorization (registration, login, tokens)
✅ User and character management
✅ Character classes, skills, and effects
✅ Inventory, equipment, and items
✅ Locations, spawns, tile maps, and teleports
✅ Mobs and NPCs
✅ Real-time combat, damage, AOE, projectiles
✅ Movement, pathfinding, and spatial grid
✅ Quests and player progression
✅ Chat and real-time game events
✅ Player presence and sessions via Redis
✅ World seeding and initial game data


❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SkyRift Server is the TypeScript backend for a multiplayer RPG, managing game world simulation, player progression, combat, quests, inventory, and NPC interactions. It utilizes NestJS for a modular architecture, separating persistent domain logic from real-time game simulation.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀
